fatuiambusher.name: Fatui Ambusher
fatuiambusher.description:
Fatui Ambushers will trigger their effects after characters on their side of the field use Skills, and will deal DMG to the active character on that side of the field. (Once per round)
There are 4 kinds of Fatui Ambushers in total:
Cryo Cicin Mage: Deals 1 Cryo DMG when triggered, 2 Usages.
Mirror Maiden: Deals 1 Hydro DMG when triggered, 2 Usages.
Pyroslinger Bracer: Deals 1 Pyro DMG when triggered, 2 Usages.
Electrohammer Vanguard: Deals 1 Electro DMG when triggered, 2 Usages.

When the character to which this is attached would be defeated: As long as Prismatic Energy has not been entirely expended, the character will not be defeated and will be healed to 1 HP. Then, the character suffers Expose Weakness and undergoes Energy Revival.

stonefacetselementalsummoning.name: Stone Facets: Elemental Summoning
stonefacetselementalsummoning.description:
End Phase: Based on the Elemental Type already absorbed by this character, absorb a different Elemental Type.
If no Elemental Type has been absorbed yet or Electro is the currently absorbed element, then absorb the power of Hydro.
If Hydro is the currently absorbed element, then absorb the power of Cryo.
If Cryo is the currently absorbed element, then absorb the power of Pyro.
If Pyro is the currently absorbed element, then absorb the power of Electro.
